title: STAT+: Trump most-favored nation drug pricing deals end after three years for some companies
description: SEC filings show that, at least for some drugmakers, "most-favored nation" drug pricing deals with President Trump last three years.
content: SEC filings show that, at least for some drugmakers, "most-favored nation" drug pricing deals with President Trump last three years.
